decision.rationale: JPEG 4:2:0 remains the default because it is the fastest measured encoder and avoids the larger 4:4:4 payload. Lossy and lossless WebP remain explicit user choices because they save bytes on the measured fixtures but cost materially more CPU. NumPy remains only because its measured 720p gain is at least 20% and at least 1 ms.
